sec.code: all_fingerprints <- data %>% group_by(element) %>% group_by(element, site, group) %>% summarise(mean = mean(value, na.rm = T), sd = sd(value, na.rm = T), max = max(value, na.rm = T), min = min(value, na.rm = T), se = sd(value)/ sqrt(length(value)), skewness = moments::skewness(value), cv = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(value, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, .groups = "drop") |> filter(element %in% c("Li", "a_col", "Fe", "Co", "x_col", "Cs", "La", "Ni", "Nb", "h_col", "b_col", "Rb", "Ca", "Sr", "c_col")) |> mutate(element = as.character(fct_recode(element, "a*" = "a_col", "b*" = "b_col", "c*" = "c_col", "h*" = "h_col", "x" = "x_col"))) %>% rename("Property" = "element", "Mean" = "mean", "SD" = "sd", "Max" = "max", "Min" = "min", "Skewness" = "skewness", "CV" = "cv") %>% mutate(Property = fct_relevel(Property, "Ca", "Co", "Cs", "Fe", "Li", "La", "Nb", "Ni", "Rb", "Sr", "a*", "b*", "c*", "h*", "x")) %>% arrange(Property) |> mutate(Property = as.character(Property))

all_fingerprints |> group_by(site) |> select(-group, -se) |> gt() |> #fmt_markdown(columns = Element)|> fmt_number(decimals = 2) |> #cols_align(align = "left") |> tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold", align = "center"), locations = cells_row_groups()) |> tab_options(column_labels.font.weight = "bold") |> tab_style( style = list(cell_text(style = "italic")), locations = cells_body( columns = Property, rows = Property %in% c("a*", "b*", "c*", "h*", "x")))

caption.p: Summary univariate statistics of selected geochemical and colour soil properties for each site (n = 49). Geochemical concentrations are reported in ppm, excecpt Ca and Fe(%).

sec.code: all_fingerprints |> filter(group %in% c("geochem", "colour"))|> group_by(site) |> summarise(skew_small = sum(Skewness <=0.5 & Skewness >=-0.5), skew_moderate = sum(Skewness > 0.5 & Skewness <1| Skewness < -0.5 & Skewness > -1), skew_large = sum(Skewness >= 1 | Skewness <= -1), pos_skew = sum(Skewness > 0), neg_skew = sum(Skewness < 0), CV_low = sum(CV <15), CV_mod = sum(CV >= 15 & CV < 35), CV_high = sum(CV >= 35 & CV <= 75), CV_v_high = sum(CV > 75), n = n())

boxed-text.preformat: # A tibble: 2 × 11 site skew_small skew_moderate skew_large pos_skew neg_skew CV_low CV_mod <chr> <int> <int> <int> <int> <int> <int> <int> 1 Agricultu… 13 2 0 10 5 11 2 2 Forest 11 3 1 10 5 7 6 # ℹ 3 more variables: CV_high <int>, CV_v_high <int>, n <int>

sec.code: all_fingerprints |> filter(group %in% c("geochem", "colour")) |> group_by(site, group) |> summarise(skew_small = sum(Skewness <=0.5 & Skewness >=-0.5), skew_moderate = sum(Skewness > 0.5 & Skewness <1| Skewness < -0.5 & Skewness > -1), skew_large = sum(Skewness >= 1 | Skewness <= -1), #pos_skew = sum(Skewness > 0), #neg_skew = sum(Skewness < 0), CV_low = sum(CV <15), CV_mod = sum(CV >= 15 & CV < 35), CV_high = sum(CV >= 35 & CV <= 75), CV_v_high = sum(CV > 75))

boxed-text.preformat: `summarise()` has grouped output by 'site'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.

# A tibble: 4 × 9 # Groups: site [2] site group skew_small skew_moderate skew_large CV_low CV_mod CV_high <chr> <chr> <int> <int> <int> <int> <int> <int> 1 Agriculture colour 5 0 0 5 0 0 2 Agriculture geochem 8 2 0 6 2 2 3 Forest colour 5 0 0 4 1 0 4 Forest geochem 6 3 1 3 5 1 # ℹ 1 more variable: CV_v_high <int>

sec.code: # all_fingerprints |> # #filter(Skewness >= 0.5 | Skewness <= -0.5) |> # filter(CV >= 35)|> # filter(site == "Forest") # #filter(group %in% c("geochem", "colour")) |> # group_by(site, group) |> # summarise(pos_skew = sum(Skewness > 0), # neg_skew = sum(Skewness < 0), # CV_low = sum(CV <15), # CV_mod = sum(CV >= 15 & CV < 35), # CV_high = sum(CV >= 35 & CV <= 75), # CV_v_high = sum(CV > 75), # n = n())

forest_r <- as.data.frame(Hmisc::rcorr(as.matrix(select(for_data, -site)))$r) %>% select("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation") %>% rownames_to_column() %>% filter(rowname %in% c("ca", "co", "cs", "fe", "li", "la", "nb", "ni", "rb", "sr", "a_c", "b_c", "c_c", "h_c", "x_c")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = plan_curvature:elevation, names_to = "Terrain", values_to = "r")
forest_p <- as.data.frame(Hmisc::rcorr(as.matrix(select(for_data, -site)))$P) %>% select("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation") %>% rownames_to_column() %>% filter(rowname %in% c("ca", "co", "cs", "fe", "li", "la", "nb", "ni", "rb", "sr", "a_c", "b_c", "c_c", "h_c", "x_c")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = plan_curvature:elevation, names_to = "Terrain", values_to = "P")
temp3 <- forest_r %>% full_join(forest_p) %>% mutate(label = case_when(P < 0.05 & P >= 0.01 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "*"), P < 0.01 & P >= 0.001 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "**"), P < 0.001 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "***"), P >= 0.05 ~ "NS")) %>% mutate(site = "Forest")

boxed-text.preformat: Joining with `by = join_by(rowname, Terrain)`

sec.code:
ag_r <- as.data.frame(Hmisc::rcorr(as.matrix(select(ag_data, -site)))$r) %>% select("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation") %>% rownames_to_column() %>% filter(rowname %in% c("ca", "co", "cs", "fe", "li", "la", "nb", "ni", "rb", "sr", "a_c", "b_c", "c_c", "h_c", "x_c")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = plan_curvature:elevation, names_to = "Terrain", values_to = "r")
ag_p <- as.data.frame(Hmisc::rcorr(as.matrix(select(ag_data, -site)))$P) %>% select("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation") %>% rownames_to_column() %>% filter(rowname %in% c("ca", "co", "cs", "fe", "li", "la", "nb", "ni", "rb", "sr", "a_c", "b_c", "c_c", "h_c", "x_c")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = plan_curvature:elevation, names_to = "Terrain", values_to = "P")
temp4 <- ag_r %>% full_join(ag_p) %>% mutate(label = case_when(P < 0.05 & P >= 0.01 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "*"), P < 0.01 & P >= 0.001 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "**"), P < 0.001 ~ paste0(round(r,2), "***"), P >= 0.05 ~ "NS")) %>% mutate(site = "Agriculture")

boxed-text.preformat: Joining with `by = join_by(rowname, Terrain)`

sec.code:
corr_tab <- temp3 %>% bind_rows(temp4) %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = c(rowname, site), names_from = "Terrain", values_from = "label") %>% select("site", "Property" = "rowname", "Elevation" = "elevation", "SAGA Wetness Index" = "saga_wetness_index", "Rel. Slope Position" = "relative_slope_position", "Vert. Dist. Channel" = "channel_network_distance", "Catchment Area" = "catchment_area", "Plan Curvature" = "plan_curvature", "Profile Curvature" = "profile_curvature") %>% mutate(Property = (fct_recode(Property, "*h**" = "h_c", "*a**" = "a_c", "*c**" = "c_c", "*b**" = "b_c", "*x*" = "x_c", "Ca" = "ca", "Co" = "co", "Cs" = "cs", "Fe" = "fe", "Li" = "li", "La" = "la", "Nb" = "nb", "Rb" = "rb", "Ni" = "ni", "Sr" = "sr"))) %>% mutate(Property = fct_relevel(Property, c("Ca", "Co", "Cs", "Fe", "Li", "La", "Nb", "Ni", "Rb", "Sr", "*a**", "*b**", "*c**", "*h**", "*x*"))) %>% arrange(Property) %>% mutate(Property = as.character(Property))
#write.csv(x = corr_tab, file = "correlation.csv", row.names = FALSE)

correlation <- corr_tab |> group_by(site) |> gt() |> fmt_markdown(columns = Property) |> tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold", align = "center"), locations = cells_row_groups()) |> tab_options(column_labels.font.weight = "bold") |> row_group_order(groups = c("Agriculture", "Forest"))|> tab_footnote( footnote = "*** p < 0.001; ** p < 0.01; * p < 0.05; NS = non-significant at p = 0.05" )
correlation
#saveRDS(correlation, file = here::here("./images/correlation.rds"))

caption.p: Pearson’s correlation coefficients for select soil properties and terrain attributes (n=49).

sec.code: suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(tidyverse) library(randomForest) library(terra) library(caret) library(patchwork) library(sf) })

attribute <- c("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation")
data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/ag_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% select("x", "y", "sr", any_of(attribute))

temp_rast <- rast(data) crs(x = temp_rast, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"
coords <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/coords.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326) %>% st_transform(crs = 26914)
p1<- ggplot() + tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = sr)) + scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Sr", breaks = seq(4, 9, 1)) + geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Agriculture")) + theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom") + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") + ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
p2 <- ggplot() + tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = elevation)) + scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Elevation (m)", option = "inferno") + geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Agriculture")) + theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom") + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") + ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
p1+p2

sec.code:
prediction <- predict(rf.fit, newdata = test) test_plot <- data.frame(pred = prediction, obs = test[[x]])
r_sq <- summary(lm(pred~obs, data = test_plot)) r_sq

sec.code: ggplot(data = test_plot, aes(y = pred, x = obs)) + geom_point() + ggpmisc::stat_poly_line() + ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq() + theme_bw() + geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(tidyverse) library(randomForest) library(terra) library(caret) library(patchwork) library(sf) })

attribute <- c("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation")
data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/forest_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% select("x", "y", "co", any_of(attribute))

temp_rast <- rast(data) crs(x = temp_rast, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"
coords <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/coords.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326) %>% st_transform(crs = 26914)
p1<- ggplot() + tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = co)) + scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Co", breaks = seq(4, 9, 1)) + geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Forest")) + theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom") + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") + ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
p2 <- ggplot() + tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = elevation)) + scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Elevation (m)", option = "inferno") + geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Forest")) + theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom") + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) + ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") + ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
p1+p2

attribute <- c("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation")

sec.code: set.seed(222) ind <- sample(2, nrow(data), replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.7, 0.3)) train <- data[ind==1,] test <- data[ind==2,]

features <- usdm::vifstep(data.frame(select(train, all_of(attribute))), th = 10)
train <- train %>% usdm::exclude(features)

boxed-text.preformat: Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!

sec.code: test <- test %>% usdm::exclude(features)

boxed-text.preformat: Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!

sec.code: my_mtry <- tuneRF(y = train[[x]], x = train[attribute], trace = TRUE, plot = TRUE) |> data.frame() |> slice(which.min(OOBError)) |> pull(mtry)

boxed-text.preformat: mtry = 2 OOB error = 0.002253823 Searching left ... mtry = 1 OOB error = 0.002104278 0.06635201 0.05 Searching right ... mtry = 4 OOB error = 0.002224091 -0.05693825 0.05

sec.code:
rf.fit <- randomForest(h_c ~ ., data = train, ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE, importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry)
rf.fit

boxed-text.preformat:
Call: randomForest(formula = h_c ~ ., data = train, ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE, importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry) Type of random forest: regression Number of trees: 500 No. of variables tried at each split: 1
Mean of squared residuals: 0.002124156 % Var explained: -13.73

sec.code: plot(rf.fit)

sec.title: Test Model
sec.p: Uses the RF model to predict the test dataset. We compare predicted against actual

sec.code:
prediction <- predict(rf.fit, newdata = test) test_plot <- data.frame(pred = prediction, obs = test[[x]])
r_sq <- summary(lm(pred~obs, data = test_plot)) r_sq

boxed-text.preformat:
Call: lm(formula = pred ~ obs, data = test_plot)
Residuals: Min 1Q Median 3Q Max -0.0224050 -0.0039911 -0.0008202 0.0021850 0.0253989
Coefficients: Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|) (Intercept) 1.10368 0.06706 16.458 5.2e-11 *** obs 0.02472 0.05920 0.417 0.682 --- Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
Residual standard error: 0.01097 on 15 degrees of freedom Multiple R-squared: 0.01149, Adjusted R-squared: -0.05442 F-statistic: 0.1743 on 1 and 15 DF, p-value: 0.6822

sec.code: ggplot(data = test_plot, aes(y = pred, x = obs)) + geom_point() + ggpmisc::stat_poly_line() + ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq() + theme_bw() + geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)

boxed-text.preformat: Registered S3 methods overwritten by 'ggpp': method from heightDetails.titleGrob ggplot2 widthDetails.titleGrob ggplot2

sec.code:
mse_test <- test_plot %>% summarise(mse = mean((obs - pred)^2))
mse_test
ImpData <- as.data.frame(importance(rf.fit)) %>% mutate(Var.Names = row.names(.)) %>% `row.names<-`(as.character(1:nrow(importance(rf.fit))))
slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10)

boxed-text.preformat: %IncMSE IncNodePurity Var.Names 2 0.7563126 0.008488989 profile_curvature 4 0.1226139 0.007765785 catchment_area 7 3.0155536 0.007673757 elevation 6 3.0116645 0.007303078 channel_network_distance 1 -0.8256961 0.006337382 plan_curvature 5 -2.6257512 0.006313887 relative_slope_position 3 -2.0040201 0.005949439 saga_wetness_index

sec.code: p1 <- ggplot(slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10), aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = IncNodePurity)) + geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = 0, yend = IncNodePurity), color="skyblue") + geom_point(aes(size = `%IncMSE`), color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) + theme_bw() + coord_flip() + labs(x = "Terrain Attribute", y = "IncNodePurity") + theme(legend.position="bottom")
slice_max(ImpData,order_by = `%IncMSE`, n = 10)

sec.code: p2<- ggplot(slice_max(ImpData,order_by = `%IncMSE`, n = 10), aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), y = `%IncMSE`)) + geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), y = 0, yend = `%IncMSE`), color="skyblue") + geom_point(aes(size = IncNodePurity), color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) + theme_bw() + coord_flip() + labs(x = "Terrain Attribute", y = "%IncMSE") + theme(legend.position="bottom")
p1+p2

importance_data <- ImpData %>% mutate(MSE_rank = rank(-`%IncMSE`)) %>% mutate(Purity_rank = rank(-IncNodePurity)) %>% mutate(site = "Forest", property = "h_col")
if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))) { importance_data_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv")) |> rows_upsert(importance_data, by = c("MSE_rank", "site", "property")) } else importance_data_final <- importance_data

sec.code:
write_csv(importance_data_final, here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))
model_performance <- tibble(MSE = rf.fit$mse[length(rf.fit$mse)], Var_exp = rf.fit$rsq[length(rf.fit$rsq)], R2 = r_sq$r.squared, mse_test = mse_test$mse, site = "Forest", property = "h_col")
if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv"))) { model_performance_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv")) |> rows_upsert(model_performance, by = c("site", "property")) } else model_performance_final <- model_performance
